annotations.note: Ultrawide-support complaint routed to platform_access (hardware/display support, alongside Deck/Linux) rather than a candidate label ('resolution' is a graphics alias but that pin is about fidelity, not aspect-ratio compatibility) — borderline, worth a ruling.
